name: @forwardimpact/outpost
description: Personal operations center — context from email, calendar, and knowledge assembled so preparation is continuous, not a morning scramble.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Walking into a meeting cold because context was scattered across email, Slack, and last week's notes.
jobs.bigHire: keep track of people, projects, and threads without depending on memory.
jobs.littleHire: walk into every meeting already oriented.
jobs.competesWith: morning email scan; re-reading calendar invites; personal notes; asking colleagues for context

forces.push: Context-switching compounds; starting cold wastes everyone's time.
forces.pull: Continuous awareness without continuous effort — context assembled.
forces.habit: Morning routines and tracking systems that feel 'good enough.'
forces.anxiety: Delegating awareness to a system feels like losing control.

jobs.firedWhen: the briefing becomes noise; or simpler tools absorb the preparation.
